prompt: Estimate or interpret the measurable condition and state why it is out of tolerance.
scenario: In a T2 work setting, the evaluated element is P-202 Drain slope & routing within 2.2 Mechanical - Piping & Plumbing. The relevant subcategory is 2.2.2 Plumbing - DWV (T2/T3). The observed field condition is: slope under ¼ in/ft (or over - solids stranding on steep runs). The work is being assessed at the rough-complete lifecycle state with source anchors IPC 704. The measurable cue is visible enough to estimate whether the condition is within tolerance.
title: T2 P-202 Measurement & estimation
